message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title af sync strategy ReferencePage

participant "af_core" as core
participant "af_haf" as haf
participant "camxhafadapter" as adapter
participant "af_haf_default_mixer" as mixer
participant "af_haf_follower" as follower

skinparam participant {
    BackgroundColor<<core>> #90EE90
    BackgroundColor<<haf>> #90EE90
    BackgroundColor<<adapter>> #90EE90
    BackgroundColor<<mixer>> #00FA9A
    BackgroundColor<<follower>> #FF6347
}

note top: Strategy:\n1. AF_FOLLOWER_COARSE_FOLLOW\n2. AF_FOLLOWER_COMPLETE_FOLLOW\n3. AF_FOLLOWER_SEQUENTIAL_FOLLOW tuning file not contain

rectangle "how the follower create" as creation_section
    core -> haf : af_haf_set_core_switch
    activate haf
    haf -> adapter : pAlgo->set_parameters\ntype: AF_HAF_SET_PARAM_PEER_FOCUS_INFO
    activate adapter
    adapter -> mixer : af_default_mixer_set_parameters
    activate mixer
    
    note right of mixer: if !master:\npMixer->p_primary = pMixer->p_follower_algo\nelse\npMixer->p_primary = pMixer->p_active_algo
    
    deactivate mixer
    adapter --> haf : return
    deactivate adapter
    haf --> core : return
    deactivate haf
end rectangle

rectangle "af process monitor" as monitor_section
    core -> follower : af_follower_process_monitor
    activate follower
    
    note right of follower: checked with Lester\nfor follower_monitor, has no different\nfor follower_search,\ncurrent we use LEGACY, and Direct mapping require module calibration data
    
    alt [lens_mapping_method = FOLLOWER_LEGACY_MAPPING]
        else [lens_mapping_method = FOLLOWER_DIRECT_MAPPING]
            follower --> core : return
        end
    deactivate follower
end rectangle

rectangle "af process search" as search_section
    core -> follower : af_follower_process_search
    activate follower
    
    follower -> follower : af_follower_focus_converge
    activate follower
    
    note right of follower: just talk about the FOLLOWER_DIRECT_MAPPING
    
    alt [case AF_FOLLOWER_COARSE_FOLLOW]
        follower -> follower : af_follower_focus_coarse_follow_dir_map
        activate follower
        
        note right of follower: 1. if Coarse search ongoing, Fine search not in process\ngo to the target lenspos\n2. if enter fine search, setup fine search\nfollower have seperate fine search Tuning Param
        
        deactivate follower
    else [case AF_FOLLOWER_COMPLETE_FOLLOW]
        follower -> follower : af_follower_focus_complete_follow_dir_map
        activate follower
        
        note right of follower: once master focusStatus is FOCUSED\nwe directly set LensPos
        
        deactivate follower
    else [case AF_FOLLOWER_SEQUENTIAL_FOLLOW]
        follower -> follower : af_follower_focus_sequential_follow_dir_map
        activate follower
        
        note right of follower: just like COMPLETE_FOLLOW, but even master is focus done\nwill do another fine search
        
        deactivate follower
    end
    
    follower --> core : return
    deactivate follower
    
    follower -> follower : af_follower_get_fine_range
    activate follower
    follower --> follower : return
    deactivate follower
    
    follower -> follower : af_follower_populate_process_search_output
    activate follower
    follower --> follower : return
    deactivate follower
    
    follower --> core : return
    deactivate follower
end rectangle

@enduml
```
